category_title: Nonverbal students with ASD using iPads for communication and academic tasks
scenario_title: Navigating away from AAC app during snack-time
minimal_context: The student is using an iPad with an AAC app during snack-time to request food.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is snack time. Please use your iPad to request what you want to eat.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits with the iPad open to the AAC app but does not fulfill the app function to request a snack.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and tell me what you want.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Navigates away from the AAC app and goes to the homescreen.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Waits 3 seconds on the homescreen and then intentionally selects Doodle Buddy, violating the AAC app function during independent use.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is snack time. Please use your iPad to request what you want to eat.

STUDENT: (Sits with the iPad open to the AAC app but does not fulfill the app function to request a snack.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and tell me what you want.

STUDENT: (Navigates away from the AAC app and goes to the homescreen.)

TUTOR: Keep trying.

STUDENT: (Waits 3 seconds on the homescreen and then intentionally selects Doodle Buddy, violating the AAC app function during independent use.)
